subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Let not thy tongue move save in remembrance of Me, nor turn thou save toward My countenance. Efface from thy heart all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی لاتحرکی لسانک الا بذکری و لاتوجهی الا بجهتی فامحی عن قلبک کل شیء
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
